note: Stub directory — v0.1. Grows as more Portals publish. Open a PR against web/public/directory.json to add yours.

portals.name: Star Screener (reference demo)
portals.brief: I screen trending GitHub repos. Ask for top gainers by weekly star delta, keyword/language matches, or a maintainer profile.

portals.name: Static Fallback (reference)
portals.brief: A Portal hosted as a static JSON file plus a single Edge function dispatcher. Demonstrates the pattern for sites that ship as static assets.

portals.name: Portal CF Worker (reference)
portals.brief: Two routes, one Cloudflare Worker — ~30 lines of glue on top of @visitportal/provider's fetch handler.
